
# Documentation Guidelines

⚠️ **NEVER create documentation files unless explicitly requested.**

## What NOT to do:
- ❌ No automatic markdown files after tasks (CHANGES.md, SUMMARY.md, etc.)
- ❌ No unsolicited changelogs or implementation docs
- ❌ No "just in case" documentation

## When to document:
- ✅ Explicitly requested in a task
- ✅ Required by project standards (README updates)
- ✅ Part of PR requirements

**Default: Focus on code, not docs.**
